summary: Heavily focused on a SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite, alongside embedded firmware for input emulation, a Windows input filter driver, and multiple machine learning research projects for trading and poker. Also maintained Android LLM assistant, file-tagging utility, and various automation tooling.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built and polished a kernel-level input filtering and injection driver for Windows.

items.title: Android TTS engine
items.description: Started a new Android text-to-speech engine project with custom voice and accent support.

items.title: E-ink device firmware
items.description: Expanded custom firmware for an e-ink device with a knowledge base app and e-book reader.

items.title: Crypto trading platform rewrite
items.description: Iterated on a major .NET rewrite of a SaaS crypto trading platform, adding proxy infrastructure, strategy templates, and billing changes.

items.title: ESP32 input emulation firmware
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for an ESP32-S3-based mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, including release workflow improvements.

items.title: Computer vision utility tool
items.description: Worked on a personal computer vision and input emulation utility, adding overlay and aim-assist features.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted machine learning experiments on mixture-of-experts architectures for cryptocurrency price prediction.

items.title: Android LLM assistant
items.description: Built an on-device LLM assistant for Android with tool-use, sub-agent delegation, and model management.

items.title: E-ink device firmware
items.description: Developed custom firmware for an e-ink reader, adding map and knowledge base applications.

items.title: E-ink Android launcher
items.description: Created a minimalist Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink devices.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Built a graph-powered code analysis tool with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Created a minimal, fast on-host labeling tool for YOLO object detection projects.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE setup with LSP and treesitter configuration.

items.title: Poker computer vision research
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games, focusing on hand and card detection.

items.title: Crypto trading platform
items.description: Worked on the initial phases and infrastructure backbone of a SaaS crypto trading platform.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Iterated on numerous algorithmic trading strategies with backtesting and parameter optimization.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for managing and monitoring automated trading bots.

items.title: Autonomous coding agent
items.description: Developed an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool with worktree management and git integration.

items.title: Algorithmic trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized algorithmic trading strategies with hyperparameter tuning.

items.title: Crypto trading signal bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for generating and posting cryptocurrency trading signals.
